meta.title: Qlick — Book appointments in 10 seconds
meta.description: The Greek booking platform that turns your shop door into a booking point. Scan a QR, book a slot, done.

hero.eyebrow: 3 months free for the first 1,000 businesses
hero.title: Book any appointment
hero.subtitle: Your customers book themselves, 24/7, no phone calls. Every appointment lands straight in your calendar.
hero.trialNote: 3 months free for the first 1,000 businesses · no credit card
hero.qrCardTitle: Why put the QR on my door?
hero.qrCardBody: It's the fastest way to show customers they can book online — anytime, even when you're closed.

showcase.title: Your shop, ready to take bookings
showcase.subtitle: Every business gets its own booking page. Customers pick a service and a time in three steps.

points.title: No app needed
points.body: Opens in the phone's browser. Customers download nothing.

points.title: Always up to date
points.body: Shows only times that are truly free, with no double bookings.

points.title: In your colors
points.body: With your logo, your hours and your services.

flow: Finds you again from their account

scan.sub: and see what your customer sees

valueProps.title: Built for every kind of appointment

items.title: QR on your door
items.description: Print-ready poster template branded for your shop. Customers scan and book without stepping inside.

items.title: Full calendar control
items.description: Staff, services, hours, holidays. Everything in one place, with drag & drop where it matters.

items.title: Smart onboarding
items.description: Find your business on OpenStreetMap, autofill every field. You're live in minutes.

items.title: Reports that matter
items.description: How many bookings came through Qlick? Which service tops the chart? See it in real time.

items.title: Mobile-first
items.description: Customers and staff, all from a phone. No app to download.

items.title: Customers who come back
items.description: After the first booking, customers find you again from their appointments, favorites or search, no scanning needed. With a customer list, history and reviews.

industries.title: For every profession
industries.subtitle: From barbershops and salons to clinics and gyms — if you work by appointment, Qlick is for you.

items.title: No double bookings
items.description: Never two appointments at the same time for the same staff — the system blocks it automatically.

items.title: GDPR & EU data
items.description: Your data is hosted on European Union servers (Frankfurt).

items.title: Greek & English
items.description: The whole platform, for you and your customers, in two languages.

items.title: Secure sign-in
items.description: Encrypted passwords and modern authentication on every account.

items.title: 0% commission
items.description: We take no cut of your bookings. Customers pay at the shop.

items.title: 24/7 bookings
items.description: Your page takes appointments around the clock, even when you're closed.

howItWorks.title: From signup to QR in under 5 minutes

steps.title: Create your account
steps.description: Drop your email, find your business on OpenStreetMap. The rest fills itself in.

steps.title: Design your QR poster
steps.description: Pick colors, logo, hours. Download a print-ready PDF instantly.

steps.title: Put it on your door
steps.description: Customers scan and book. You see the appointments in your calendar.

pricing.title: Simple. No surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Pay only when you're ready.
pricing.footnote: We never ask for a card or charge automatically. When a plan ends, your page stops taking online bookings — it isn't deleted — and you always see the exact expiry date in Settings.

plans.name: Free trial
plans.description: All of Qlick, for the first 1,000 businesses. After that: 1 month free.
plans.note: No card. When it ends it stops on its own — no charge.

plans.name: Monthly
plans.description: Everything an active business needs, with no limits.

plans.name: Yearly
plans.description: Same as Monthly, in one payment. Just €7.40 a month.
plans.note: No automatic renewal · you're not locked in for another year.

cta.title: Ready to put a QR on your door?
cta.subtitle: Start your free trial today. No credit card, no commitment.

footer.tagline: Online appointments, with QR on the door.

shop.bookingsPausedNotice: This shop has temporarily paused online bookings. Try again later or contact them by phone.

tour.metaTitle: Tour — see what Qlick does · Qlick
tour.metaDescription: Real screens from Qlick: what your customer sees, how they book, and everything you manage.
tour.title: See everything Qlick does
tour.subtitle: No promises — real screens from the product. What your customer sees, how they book, and what you manage.
tour.loopSubtitle: From the scan to your calendar, with no phone calls.

loop.title: Your customer scans the QR
loop.body: The poster on your door or counter opens your page. No app, no waiting.

loop.title: They book in seconds
loop.body: They pick a service, a person and a time — seeing only the genuinely free slots.

loop.title: You see it instantly
loop.body: The booking lands in your calendar by itself, with name and notes.

tour.sectionsTitle: The whole system, screen by screen
tour.sectionsSubtitle: Everything below is a real screen from Qlick — not a mockup.

sections.title: Your storefront page
sections.body: A clean, branded page that opens from the scan or from search — designed for mobile.

sections.title: Booking without friction
sections.body: The appointment is booked in a popup right on your page — the customer never gets lost.
points: Only the genuinely free slots, live
Tracks whether it came from QR or the site

sections.title: A calendar that works like you do
sections.body: The whole week at a glance, per staff member, from your phone or computer.
points: A column per staff member, color-coded
Pause online bookings with one click

sections.title: A QR poster with your identity
sections.body: Design the poster the way you want it and print it — that's where everything starts.

sections.title: Appointments, staff & services
sections.body: The shop's day-to-day in lists you understand at a glance.
points: Staff with their own services & colors

sections.title: Reviews that build your name
sections.body: Customers leave a review after their appointment — and you reply publicly.

sections.title: Reports that show what performs
sections.body: Plain, clear numbers — how much you make and where customers come from.
points: Booking source: how much the QR brings

extras.title: Hours with shifts
extras.body: Morning-afternoon, holidays, exceptions — whatever applies to your shop.

extras.title: Greek & English
extras.body: Your page and the system speak both languages.

extras.title: Simple subscription
extras.body: €9/month or €89/year. No hidden costs, cancel anytime.

extras.title: Security & backups
extras.body: Your data protected — we take care of it.

tour.retentionTitle: The QR is only the first meeting
tour.retentionBody: Once they book once, the customer has an account: they find you again from their appointments, favorites and search — and rebook without scanning again.
retentionPoints: Their appointments & history in one place
Favorite businesses for a quick return
tour.ctaTitle: Ready to see it in your own shop?
tour.ctaBody: Set it up in minutes, with your own QR poster. 3 months free for the first 1,000 businesses.

booking.anyAvailableSub: The shop assigns an available person
booking.slotTaken: That time was just taken. Pick another.
booking.emailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email first to book an appointment. Check your inbox for the confirmation email.
booking.accountSuspended: Your account has been suspended due to a violation of the Terms of Use, so you can’t make new bookings. Questions: info@qlick.gr
booking.tooManyActive: You already have 5 active appointments. Cancel one or wait until one is completed to book a new one.
booking.customerBusy: You already have another appointment at that time. Pick a different time.
booking.blocked: The shop is not accepting bookings from your account.
booking.bookingsPaused: This shop has temporarily paused online bookings. Try again later or contact them directly.
booking.noStaffFree: No specific person is free at this time — choose “Anyone available”.
booking.pickDayForTimes: Pick a day to see times.
booking.noTimes: No available times on this day. Try another.
booking.payAtShop: Payment is made at the shop.
booking.name: Name
booking.notePlaceholder: e.g. something the shop should know
booking.rebookHint: Next time you won't need to scan the QR again — find us from your account: in your appointments, favorites or search.
booking.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
booking.emailExists: This email already exists. Try signing in.
booking.authNeeded: An account is needed to book — for appointment reliability.

search.title: Find businesses
search.subtitle: Choose an area & service type to see businesses near you.
search.pickArea: Choose an area from the list.
search.emptyPrompt: Choose an area (and optionally a service type) to see businesses near you.
search.noResults: No businesses found in this area

account.title: My account
account.suspendedBody: Your account was suspended due to a violation of the Terms of Use and you can’t make new bookings. If you believe this is a mistake, contact us:
account.noFavorites: You don’t have any favorite businesses yet. Tap the heart on a business for quick access.
account.noReviews: You haven’t left any reviews yet. After a completed appointment you can rate it from “My appointments”.
account.cancelBody: The appointment will be cancelled. This can’t be undone.
account.cityHint: Set your area to see the distance to businesses
account.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
account.reviewWindowExpired: The review window has closed (48 hours after completion).
account.errReviewNotCompleted: You can only review completed appointments.
account.errReviewWindowClosed: More than 48 hours have passed since completion — reviews are now closed.

dashboard.welcomeBody: Your business was created. Add a staff member and your services to automatically publish your public page and start taking bookings.
dashboard.stepStaff: Add a staff member (at least one)
dashboard.stepPublish: Publish your business (automatic once you have a staff member and a service)
dashboard.publishedTitle: Congratulations! Your business is now published 🎉
dashboard.publishedBody: Your public page is live and taking bookings. Here are two quick settings to help you stand out.
dashboard.nextPhotoBody: Upload a logo or photo from Settings. It shows on your public page and in search results.
dashboard.nextQrTitle: Create a QR poster for your door
dashboard.nextQrBody: Make a poster with a QR code customers scan to book. Quick guide:
dashboard.nextQrStep2: Pick a color palette and upload your logo.
dashboard.nextQrStep3: Click “Load from Settings” to pull in your opening hours.
dashboard.nextQrStep4: Download the PDF (A4) or PNG and print it for your door.
dashboard.nextCalBody: In the calendar you'll find a guide on how to use it and how to enter appointments you already have. You can also temporarily pause online bookings until you've added them all.
dashboard.nextCalReassure: Don't worry: the system never lets two appointments land at the same time for the same staff member.

picker.noneSelected: You haven’t selected any types yet.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.note: This section is being prepared and will be available soon.

customers.subtitle: Your customers, with history and notes.
customers.notesPlaceholder: e.g. black coffee, allergy, preferred cut…
customers.accountHint: These details come from the customer's account — you can only edit the note.
customers.deleteConfirm: Delete customer “{name}”? This cannot be undone.

recurring.title: Recurring appointment
recurring.endConfirm: Cancel all upcoming appointments in this series?

report.sent: The report was sent to Qlick.
report.blockDesc: They won’t be able to make a new booking. What about their future appointments?
report.reportInfo: The report is sent to Qlick for review.

services.subtitle: Manage the services customers can book
services.name: Service name
services.empty: You don’t have any services yet. Add your first one to activate your public booking page.

bookings.subtitle: All the shop’s bookings
bookings.clearConfirmPast: Permanently delete {n} past appointments? This can’t be undone.
bookings.clearConfirmCancelled: Permanently delete {n} cancelled appointments? This can’t be undone.

reviews.subtitle: Customer ratings per person — hide & reply
reviews.emptyAll: No reviews yet. They’ll appear here once customers rate their completed appointments.

settings.subtitle: Business details & hours
settings.dragHint: Drag the handle to reorder the days.
settings.catSubtitle: Pick everything your business does — you’ll appear in search for each of them.
settings.catPickOne: Choose at least one service type.
settings.dangerDesc: Deletion is permanent: your shop, bookings, services, staff and reviews are removed. Your account stays.
settings.deleteConfirmBody: Your shop goes offline immediately and will be permanently deleted after 24 hours. You can cancel the deletion until then. Your account stays.
settings.deletionScheduledTitle: Your shop is scheduled for deletion
settings.deletionScheduledBody: Your shop is offline and will be permanently deleted {when}. You can cancel until then.

bizInfo.title: Business details
bizInfo.logoHint: Shown top-right on your public page in full (no cropping). Recommended: ~800×400px (landscape) or square ~600×600px, transparent PNG ideal. Up to 5MB.
bizInfo.coverHint: A large photo of your space. Shown as the background at the top of your public page. Recommended: ~1600×900px (landscape). Up to 5MB.
bizInfo.ownerFirstHint: Used when you book appointments as a customer.
bizInfo.emailHint: Shown on your public page as the contact email.
bizInfo.cityHint: Pick a city first for more accurate address search
bizInfo.addressHint: Type the street & number and pick from the suggestions
bizInfo.gpsHint: Press this only while you are at your shop using your mobile. Sets the exact GPS location and automatically updates the city.

staff.subtitle: Manage the people shown as columns in the calendar
staff.name: Name
staff.noServices: No services yet. Add services first.
staff.empty: You don’t have any staff yet. Add the first person to show as a column in the calendar.
staff.deleteConfirm: Delete the person “{name}”? Their appointments will become unassigned.
staff.followsBusiness: Follows the shop’s hours. Enable “Custom” for separate hours for this person.
staff.endAfterStart: the end time must be after the start.
staff.bookingsInRange: Heads up: there are {count} bookings in this range. Remember to move or cancel them.
staff.endBeforeStart: The end date is before the start.
staff.endTimeAfterStart: The end time must be after the start.

reports.subtitle: Revenue, appointments, services, staff
reports.reportForPost: is sent to Qlick for review.
reports.blockDesc: They won’t be able to make a new booking at your shop. What about their future appointments?

calendar.subtitle: Appointments by day, week or month
calendar.guideTip1: Click an empty time cell to add an appointment (name, phone, service).
calendar.guideTip2: On a computer: drag an appointment to change its time/staff, or drag its bottom edge for duration. On mobile: tap it and choose “Move appointment” or “Change duration”.
calendar.guideTip3: Click an appointment to set an outcome (Completed / No-show / Cancel) or report a customer.
calendar.guideTip4: Switch between Day / Week / Month at the top left and navigate with the arrows.
calendar.guideExisting1: Tap “Pause online bookings” so no customer books online while you enter them.
calendar.guideExisting2: Add your existing appointments one by one by clicking their time and filling in name/phone/service.
calendar.guideExisting3: When you're done, tap “Resume bookings” to start accepting online bookings again.
calendar.guideNoDouble: Don't worry — two appointments can never land at the same time for the same staff member. Even under “Unassigned”, if no staff member is free at that moment the booking is refused. This check applies both to online bookings and to ones you add by hand.
calendar.pausedBanner: Online bookings are temporarily paused. Customers can't book online — you can still add appointments normally.
calendar.noStaff: You don’t have any staff yet. Add people to show columns in the calendar.
calendar.noFreeStaff: No staff available at this time.
calendar.noServicesStaff: No active services. Add services from the “Services” page.
calendar.walkinHint: With a phone it counts as a phone booking; without, a walk-in.
calendar.noSlots: No available times on this day.
calendar.keepStaffNote: Staff, service and duration stay the same.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.create_failed: Couldn't create it. Please try again.
errors.move_failed: Couldn't move it. Please try again.
errors.resize_failed: Couldn't change the duration. Please try again.
errors.staff_busy: This staff member already has a booking at that time.
errors.no_capacity: No staff available at that time — everyone is booked.
errors.outside_hours: Outside business hours. The booking must fit within opening hours.
errors.choose_category: Choose at least one service type.
errors.staff_limit_free: On the free plan you can have up to 3 active staff members. Upgrade to Monthly or Yearly for unlimited.
errors.service_limit_free: On the free plan you can have up to 3 active services. Upgrade to Monthly or Yearly for unlimited.
errors.need_name_or_phone: Enter a name or phone number.
errors.cannot_delete_account: Customers with an account can't be deleted.
errors.delete_failed: Delete didn't complete. Please try again.

subscription.soonBody: Renew before it expires to keep taking online bookings without interruption.
subscription.expiredBody: Your shop and all your data stay exactly as they are, and you still have full access to everything. While the subscription stays inactive, though, your customers see the message “This shop has temporarily paused online bookings” and cannot book. Renew your subscription and bookings open again instantly, with nothing lost.

pastDue.title: Past appointments
pastDue.intro: Mark what happened for each appointment whose time has passed.
pastDue.allDoneHint: No appointments are waiting for an update.

qr.subtitle: Design your shop’s QR poster
qr.qrExists: There is already a QR on the poster
qr.multiHint1: Drag to move them all together. Hold
qr.multiHint2: + click to add/remove from the selection.
qr.noSelHint1: Click an element to edit it. Drag to move, pull the corners to resize/rotate.
qr.noSelHint2a: Drag on empty space to select many ·
qr.qrLinkAuto: The QR link is set automatically from your shop.
qr.tableRowsHint2: to reorder. The ✓ sets whether the line under the row shows.
qr.hoursPlaceholder: Hours (Enter for a 2nd shift, e.g. afternoon)
qr.mobileBody: The QR poster designer needs a large screen and a mouse for precise editing. Open this page on a computer to design and download your poster. Your saved poster stays safe.
qr.browserNoteBody: If the poster looks distorted or its colors look off on screen, it's most likely your own browser settings — e.g. dark mode, night mode, color filters or inverted colors, reading mode, or a browser extension. The file you download and print (PDF/PNG) is not affected — it always comes out exactly as you designed it.
